rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal limits and has no textual or operational overlap with Educ. Code §31.105, which governs sale and disposal of instructional materials and technological equipment by school districts.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may sell printed instructional materials on the date the instructional material is discontinued for use in the public schools by the State Board of Education or the commissioner.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses disposal of instructional materials; the proposed change addresses homestead exemption amounts. No intersection in operative text.
